data.title: The Physical Catalyst Loop
data.description: High-intensity sand volleyball acts as a physiological reset that directly enables 'flawless' coding sprints, suggesting that physical exertion is a necessary precursor for your peak cognitive fluidity.

data.title: The Perfectionism-Exhaustion Trap
data.description: Engaging in 'secondary perfectionism' (aesthetic/jargon-stuffing) during moments of architectural friction functions as a subconscious avoidance tactic, leading to 3:30 AM finishes and subsequent academic performance degradation.

data.title: The Architectural Friction Feedback Loop
data.description: Encountering technical hurdles like connection pooling or StarUML mapping triggers a shift from productive engineering to performative perfectionism, which creates a 6-hour energy crater that undermines your ability to handle complex academic concepts like B-Trees and memory allocation.
